info.description: Blockyard is a platform for deploying and managing Shiny applications.
info.title: Blockyard API

get.description: List apps with RBAC filtering, search, tag filter, and pagination. Use ?deleted=true for soft-deleted apps (admin only).

post.description: Create a new application owned by the caller.

get.description: Get a single application by UUID or name. Returns 404 if not found or caller has no access.

delete.description: Soft-delete an app, stopping all workers. Use ?purge=true for permanent deletion (admin only, app must be soft-deleted first).

patch.description: Update an application's settings. All fields are optional. Changing access_type requires owner/admin.

get.description: List all ACL entries for an app. Requires owner or admin role.

post.description: Grant a user viewer or collaborator access to an app. Requires owner or admin role.

delete.description: Remove a specific access grant from an app. Requires owner or admin role.

get.description: List all bundles for an app, ordered by upload time.

post.description: Upload a tar.gz bundle archive. Triggers async restore (package installation). Track progress via the returned task_id.
Disable an app, draining active sessions and stopping all workers.
Enable an app, allowing it to accept traffic and start workers.

get.description: Stream worker logs for an app. Returns buffered output immediately; streams live lines unless stream=false.

parameters.description: Set to 'false' to return buffered logs only
parameters.name: stream

post.description: Start a background dependency refresh for the active bundle. Fails if the bundle was deployed with pinned dependencies.
Roll back to the previous refresh or the original build (?target=build). Starts a background task.

parameters.description: Rollback target: 'build' for original deploy, omit for previous refresh
parameters.name: target

post.description: Restore a soft-deleted app. Only admins and the original owner can restore.
Switch an app's active bundle to a previous one. Stops running workers and activates the target bundle.

get.description: Returns live workers, sessions, container stats, and activity metrics for an app.
List sessions for an app. Supports filtering by user and status.
List all tags attached to an app.

post.description: Attach a tag to an app. Requires owner, collaborator, or admin role.

delete.description: Detach a tag from an app. Requires owner, collaborator, or admin role.

get.description: Paginated, RBAC-filtered app listing with tags and search. Deprecated — use GET /apps with search/tag params.

post.description: Exchange a proxy session reference token for a scoped OpenBao vault token. Used internally by workers.

get.description: List bundle deployments across all apps. Supports search, status filter, and pagination.

parameters.description: Filter by status (e.g. ready, pending, failed)
parameters.name: status

post.description: Create a new tag. Admin only. Name must be a lowercase slug.

delete.description: Delete a tag. Admin only. Cascades to all app-tag associations.

get.description: Returns the current status (running, completed, failed) of a background task.
Stream log output for a background task (e.g. bundle restore). Returns buffered output, then follows live lines until task completes.
Returns the authenticated caller's profile (sub, email, name, role).

post.description: Store a credential (API key) for an external service in the vault.

get.description: List all PATs for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new PAT. Can only be called via browser session (not via another PAT). The token value is returned only once.

delete.description: Revoke all personal access tokens for the authenticated user.
Revoke a single personal access token by ID.

get.description: Get a single user by sub. Admin only.

patch.description: Update a user's role or active status. Admin only. Cannot modify own account.
